title: elaphoglossum ortegae
intro: Elaphoglossum ortegae, also known as the Oregae Elaphoglossum fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum ortegae include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support immune function. In herbal preparations, Elaphoglossum ortegae is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its antiseptic and antibacterial properties.
